## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional changes)
- [ ] 🧪 Tests (adding or updating tests only)
- [ ] 🔧 Chore (build process, dependencies, CI config)

---

## Testing

<!-- Describe how you tested your changes. -->

- [ ] I ran the existing tests locally and they all pass
- [ ] I added new tests to cover my changes
- [ ] I manually tested the affected user flows

**Test commands run:**
```bash
# e.g.
cd backend && npm run test
cd frontend && npm run test
```

## Checklist
